user.title: Marstek Local API V2
user.description: Searching for Marstek devices on your network...

discovery.title: Discovered Devices
discovery.description: Found {count} Marstek device(s). Select which to add.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: No devices found automatically. Enter the device IP address.

name_devices.title: Device Names
name_devices.description: Set a friendly name for each device.

options_initial.title: Optional Settings
options_initial.description: Configure optional entity references. Leave empty to skip.

data.electricity_price_entity: Electricity price sensor entity (€/kWh) – used for cost/revenue sensors
data.grid_power_entity: Grid import power sensor entity (W) – for solar/grid share calculation
data.market_price_entity: Market price sensor with hourly 'prices' attribute – for plan sensors
data.energy_tax_entity: Energy tax sensor entity (€/kWh excl. VAT)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the IP address and UDP port.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.

data.market_price_entity: Market price sensor (with hourly prices attribute)
